text: Jabse mere partner ne kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gaya hoon, mere sar mein aisa bhari-pan hai jaise koi pathar rakha ho. EMI ka pressure aur WFH ki akelepan mein rona toh door ki baat hai kyunki mard nahi rota, par ab chest tightness itni hai ki saans lene mein takleef ho rahi hai. Main samajh nahi paa raha ye sharir itna kyun toot raha hai, bas thakan aisi hai ki laptop kholne ki himmat nahi hoti.

Uski baatein sunkar ki shehar ne mujhe badal diya, mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan aur acidity shuru ho gayi hai jo kisi dawa se nahi ja rahi. Startup ki deadlines aur ghar ki izzat ka bojh kandhon mein itni jakdan deta hai ki hila nahi jata. Mard ko toh sakht hona chahiye par ye poore badan mein suiyan kyun chubhti rehti hain, mujhe lagta hai koi viral bukhar chadha hua hai.

Hidden identity aur family ke 'log kya kahenge' wale darr ke beech jab usne badalne ki baat ki, toh meri raaton ki neend bilkul ud gayi. Ab har waqt gale mein kuch atka sa mehsus hota hai aur dil ki dhadkan achanak badh jaati hai jaise koi heart ki takleef ho. Main ro kar apna dard nahi baant sakta kyunki samaj mard ki kamzori pasand nahi karta, isliye bas doctor se gas ki dawai maang raha hoon.

Joint family ki sasu-maa se conflict aur ab partner ke 'badalne' wale taane ne mere dimaag ki nasein phula di hain. Career gap aur child pressure toh tha hi, par ab ye sir dard itna shiddat ka hai ki aankhein kholna mushkil ho gaya hai. Main mard nahi hoon par ghar mein mard jaisa sakht banna padta hai, isliye ye sharir ki tootan bas thakan ka naam lekar chhupa leti hoon.

Partner ne jab taana mara toh mera dum ghutne laga aur tabse hatheliyon mein paseena aur poore sharir mein kampann hoti rehti hai. MNC mein WFH isolation ki wajah se koi community nahi hai, bas ye peeth ka dard hai jo laptop dekhte hi badh jata hai. Rona toh divorce stigma jaisa kamzor kaam lagega, isliye main bas migraine ki painkiller kha kar kaam chala raha hoon.
